title: Singer Patrick Bruel denies wave of sexual assault allegations in France
summary_full: Among Bruel's latest accusers is well-known TV and radio presenter Flavie Flament, who alleges he raped her in 1991.
summary_public: Among Bruel's latest accusers is well-known TV and radio presenter Flavie Flament, who alleges he raped her in 1991.
